languages.text: "Нет смысла умножать сущности и увеличивать количество переменных. Вместо этого можно избрать интенсивный метод: провести аугментирование тех, кто уже задействован в Процедуре 0-Х. Использование пси-усилителей, вживляемых в нервный ствол, кратно увеличит их производительность. Нунциус предполагает, что инфоангел, запрашивающий исполнение Процедуры, сочтет полученную мощность достаточной, и я с ним согласен".

"There is no benefit in multiplying entities and increasing the number of variables. Instead, one may adopt an intensive approach: augment those already engaged in Procedure 0-X. The use of psi-amplifiers implanted in the nerve column will have a manifold increase in their output. Nuncius predicts that the data-angel which requests execution of the Procedure will deem the resulting power sufficient, and I concur with his assessment."
languages.original_text: "Нет смысла умножать сущности и увеличивать количество переменных. Вместо этого можно избрать интенсивный метод: провести аугментирование тех, кто уже задействован в Процедуре 0-Х. "There is no benefit in multiplying entities and increasing the number of variables. Instead, one may adopt an intensive approach: augment those already engaged in Procedure 0-X. The use of psi-amplifiers implanted in the nerve column will have a manifold increase in their output. Nuncius predicts that the data-angel which requests execution of the Procedure will deem the resulting power sufficient, and I concur with his assessment."

languages.text: "Es birgt keinen Nutzen, Wesenheiten zu multiplizieren und die Zahl der Variablen zu erhöhen. Ein intensiver Ansatz wäre hilfreicher. Konzentriert Euch auf Prozedur-0-X-Einheiten. Die Implantation von Psi-Verstärkern in ihre Nervensäule wird ihren Output um ein Vielfaches erhöhen. Nuncius prognostiziert, dass der Datenengel, der die Ausführung der Prozedur anfordert, die daraus resultierende Energie als ausreichend bewerten wird, und ich stimme ihm zu."
languages.original_text: "There is no benefit in multiplying entities and increasing the number of variables. Nuncius predicts that the data-angel which requests execution of the Procedure will deem the resulting power sufficient, and I concur with his assessment."

Die Implantation von Psi-Verstärkern in ihre Nervensäule wird ihren Output um ein Vielfaches erhöhen. Nuncius prognostiziert, dass der Datenengel, der die Ausführung der Prozedur anfordert, die daraus resultierende Energie als ausreichend bewerten wird, und ich stimme ihm zu."

languages.text: « Il n'y a aucun avantage à démultiplier les entités et à augmenter le nombre de variables. Bien au contraire, mieux vaut adopter une approche plus intensive en dotant les participants actuels de la Procédure 0-X d'augmentations. L'utilisation d'amplificateurs psi implantés dans la colonne vertébrale aura une influence exponentielle sur leur productivité. Nuncius prédit que l'ange numérique demandant l'exécution de la Procédure estimera que la puissance ainsi générée sera suffisante. Je suis du même avis. »
languages.original_text: "There is no benefit in multiplying entities and increasing the number of variables. Instead, one may adopt an intensive approach: augment those already engaged in Procedure 0-X. The use of psi-amplifiers implanted in the nerve column will have a manifold increase in their output. Nuncius predicts that the data-angel which requests execution of the Procedure will deem the resulting power sufficient, and I concur with his assessment."

traits.locale_text: « Il n'y a aucun avantage à démultiplier les entités et à augmenter le nombre de variables. Bien au contraire, mieux vaut adopter une approche plus intensive en dotant les participants actuels de la Procédure 0-X d'augmentations. L'utilisation d'amplificateurs psi implantés dans la colonne vertébrale aura une influence exponentielle sur leur productivité. Nuncius prédit que l'ange numérique demandant l'exécution de la Procédure estimera que la puissance ainsi générée sera suffisante. Je suis du même avis. »

languages.text: «No nos beneficia multiplicar las entidades y aumentar la cantidad de variables. En lugar de eso, puede adoptarse un método intensivo: aumentar a los que ya forman parte del Procedimiento 0-X. El uso de amplificadores psíquicos implantados en la columna nerviosa reforzará varias veces su rendimiento. Nuncius predice que el ángel de datos que solicita la ejecución del Procedimiento considerará la potencia resultante suficiente, y yo coincido con su valoración».
languages.original_text: "There is no benefit in multiplying entities and increasing the number of variables. Instead, one may adopt an intensive approach: augment those already engaged in Procedure 0-X. The use of psi-amplifiers implanted in the nerve column will have a manifold increase in their output. Nuncius predicts that the data-angel which requests execution of the Procedure will deem the resulting power sufficient, and I concur with his assessment."

languages.text: "Varlıkları çoğaltmanın ve değişken sayısını artırmanın hiçbir faydası yok. Bunun yerine yoğun bir yaklaşım benimsenebilir: Hâlihazırda 0-X Sayılı Prosedür ile meşgul olanları ogmente edelim. Sinir sütununa implantlanan ruhsezi yükselteçlerinin kullanılması, çıktılarında katlanarak bir artış sağlayacaktır. Nuncius, prosedürün yürütülmesini talep eden veri meleğinin elde edilen gücü yeterli bulacağını öngörüyor. Ben de bu değerlendirmesine katılıyorum."
languages.original_text: "There is no benefit in multiplying entities and increasing the number of variables. Instead, one may adopt an intensive approach: augment those already engaged in Procedure 0-X. The use of psi-amplifiers implanted in the nerve column will have a manifold increase in their output. Nuncius predicts that the data-angel which requests execution of the Procedure will deem the resulting power sufficient, and I concur with his assessment."

Sinir sütununa implantlanan ruhsezi yükselteçlerinin kullanılması, çıktılarında katlanarak bir artış sağlayacaktır. Nuncius, prosedürün yürütülmesini talep eden veri meleğinin elde edilen gücü yeterli bulacağını öngörüyor. Ben de bu değerlendirmesine katılıyorum."

languages.text: “增加实体数量、引入更多变量并无益处。相反，可以采用强化方案：改造那些已经参与0-X程序的个体。在神经束中植入灵能放大器后，其输出效率将成倍提升。努恩修斯预测，请求执行该程序的数据天使会判定所产生的能量已经足够。我赞同他的判断。”
languages.original_text: "There is no benefit in multiplying entities and increasing the number of variables. Instead, one may adopt an intensive approach: augment those already engaged in Procedure 0-X. The use of psi-amplifiers implanted in the nerve column will have a manifold increase in their output. Nuncius predicts that the data-angel which requests execution of the Procedure will deem the resulting power sufficient, and I concur with his assessment."
